name: AndPredicate
javadoc:
/**
 * Predicate implementation that returns true if both the predicates return true.
 *
 * @since 3.0
 * @version $Id: AndPredicate.java 1686855 2015-06-22 13:00:27Z tn $
 */

members.name: AndPredicate
members.javadoc: /** * Constructor that performs no validation. * Use andPredicate if you want that. * * @param predicate1 the first predicate to check, not null * @param predicate2 the second predicate to check, not null */

tags.name: predicate1
tags.content: the first predicate to check, not null
tags.description: the first predicate to check, not null

tags.name: predicate2
tags.content: the second predicate to check, not null
tags.description: the second predicate to check, not null

members.name: andPredicate
members.javadoc: /** * Factory to create the predicate. * * @param the type that the predicate queries * @param predicate1 the first predicate to check, not null * @param predicate2 the second predicate to check, not null * @return the and predicate * @throws NullPointerException if either predicate is null */

tags.name: <T>
tags.content: the type that the predicate queries

tags.name: predicate1
tags.content: the first predicate to check, not null

members.name: evaluate
members.javadoc:
/**
 * Evaluates the predicate returning true if both predicates return true.
 *
 * @param object  the input object
 * @return true if both decorated predicates return true
 */

tags.content: if both decorated predicates return true
tags.description: true if both decorated predicates return true
